nasb.text: “The first offspring from every womb belongs to Me, and all your male livestock, the first offspring from cattle and sheep.

esv.text: All that open the womb are mine, all your male livestock, the firstborn of cow and sheep.

cnv.text: 凡是頭胎的都是我的；你的牲畜中，無論是牛或羊，凡是公的和頭生的，都是我的。

ccb.text: “凡是头胎生的儿子都属于我，包括牲畜中一切头胎生的公牛和公羊。
